title: What is TV DocX Viewer?
content: TV DocX Viewer is an Android TV app designed to help users open and read DOCX files on their television using a TV-friendly interface and remote navigation.

title: What file type does this app support?
content: The app is designed for viewing DOCX files. It scans connected USB drives and imported storage locations to find available DOCX documents.

title: How do I open a DOCX file?
content: From the home screen, navigate to the DOCX file you want to view and press the OK button on your TV remote to open it in the viewer.

title: Does the app automatically detect DOCX files on USB drives?
content: Yes. The app automatically scans connected USB drives for DOCX files and displays them in a list with thumbnails and file names.

title: What information can I see for a DOCX file?
content: You can long press the OK button on a selected DOCX file to view file details such as file name, location, size, and last modified date.

title: Can I delete a DOCX file from the app?
content: Yes. When you long press the OK button on a focused DOCX file, the app shows file options including delete, where supported for that file location.

title: How can I import DOCX files into the app?
content: The app supports DOCX import using Web import, WiFi import, and FTP import, making it easy to transfer files to your Android TV.

title: How does Web import work?
content: Web import uses a token-based connection, so the sending device does not need to be on the same network as the TV.

title: How does WiFi import work?
content: WiFi import is intended for faster file transfer when your sending device and Android TV are connected to the same network.

title: How does FTP import work?
content: FTP import uses an anonymous FTP connection. For this method, the sending device must be connected to the same network as the TV.

title: Are QR codes available for file import?
content: Yes. The Web import and FTP import pages provide QR codes to make connecting from another device faster and easier.

title: Can I reload the file list after adding new documents?
content: Yes. The app includes a reload files option to rescan the USB drive and the imports folder for newly added DOCX files.

title: Does the app support bookmarks?
content: Yes. You can bookmark pages inside a DOCX file and later access them from bookmark listings.

title: How do I bookmark a page?
content: While viewing a DOCX file, press OK to open the viewer options menu and choose the bookmark option to toggle a bookmark for the current page.

title: Can I view bookmarks from all documents in one place?
content: Yes. The app includes a bookmark page where you can view bookmarks collected across multiple DOCX files.

title: What details are shown in the bookmark list?
content: Each bookmark item can display the bookmarked page thumbnail, page number, and the title of the DOCX file.

title: Can I delete a bookmark?
content: Yes. You can long press a bookmark item in the bookmarks listing page to delete that bookmark.

title: Does the app remember my previous reading position?
content: Yes. The viewer can reopen a DOCX file using the last used page number and previous viewing preferences such as zoom, orientation, and night mode.

title: What viewer options are available while reading a DOCX file?
content: The viewer options include zoom in, zoom out, bookmark, reset zoom, go to page, bookmarks list, search, night mode, and close.

title: Can I search text inside a DOCX file?
content: Yes. The viewer includes a search option that helps you find text within the currently opened DOCX document.

title: Can I jump to a specific page?
content: Yes. The go to page option in the viewer allows you to move directly to a specific page number.

title: How does zoom work in the DOCX viewer?
content: You can zoom in and zoom out from the viewer options. When the page is zoomed in, the left and right remote keys can be used for horizontal scrolling.

title: What happens when the page is zoomed out or fit to height?
content: When the page is zoomed out, or when it is effectively in a fit-to-height reading state, the left and right remote keys can be used to change pages.

title: Can I reset the zoom level?
content: Yes. The viewer includes a reset zoom option to quickly return the page to its default zoom state.

title: Does the app support night mode?
content: Yes. The viewer includes a night mode option that changes the page display for more comfortable reading in darker environments.

title: How do I close the viewer options menu?
content: You can close the DOCX options menu by selecting the close option or by pressing the Back button on the TV remote.

title: Will I be able to see page changes while using viewer options?
content: Yes. The viewer options are shown as an overlay on top of the current page, so you can see live changes while adjusting settings like zoom and night mode.

title: What can I see in the settings page?
content: The settings page shows device screen resolution, screen ratio, available storage, total DOCX file count, memory used by DOCX files, bookmark count, thumbnail count, and thumbnail storage size.

title: Can I clear imported DOCX files from the app?
content: Yes. The settings page includes an option to clear all DOCX files in the imports folder. DOCX files on USB drives are not deleted by this action.

title: Can I clear thumbnails and bookmarks?
content: Yes. The settings page includes options to clear saved thumbnails and bookmarks.

title: Does the app have a subscription page?
content: Yes. The app includes a subscribe page where users can make a subscription.

title: How can I manage my subscription?
content: The app includes a manage subscription page that provides information about subscription management.

title: Is there a help or FAQ page in the app?
content: Yes. The app includes a help and FAQ page for common questions and detailed answers.

title: Does the app include support and feedback options?
content: Yes. The support and feedback page includes QR codes that link to the support Facebook page and a feedback form.

title: Can I check the app version?
content: Yes. The app includes a version info menu item so users can easily see the current app version number.

title: Is there an About Us page?
content: Yes. The app includes an About Us page with developer details.

title: Does the app include privacy policy and terms pages?
content: Yes. The app includes separate pages for the privacy policy and terms of use.

title: Is the interface designed for Android TV?
content: Yes. The app UI is developed based on Android TV design principles to make navigation easy with a TV remote.
